content: can we make a seperate thread for faq shits like r wheels and tier list and i can directly guide them there instead of having to send the whole handbook

uh no just post the images and put it in  thread to make it more accessible

Im starting a video series diving into Morimens and explaining everything to someone who would be a complete beginner. I will be adding videos to this threat as i make them but my first one is live today :) Feel free to check it out if youre new!

https://youtu.be/5AN8-9vmXI0

embeds.title: The Ultimate Morimens Beginner Guide
embeds.description:
This is the start of my Videoseries where im explaining how to start playing Morimens, if youre a complete beginner.

More resources:
Official Discord - https://discord.gg/hyEwaD3Z
Beginner Handbook by Cheri - https://docs.google.com/document/d/1THjxR9hHs4NWHqSWHHa2dHAGuE_cRGelfzXdBfCnIlM/edit?usp=s

content:
Hi I'm reading the guide, and one thing you mention on how to use our menophens, specifically use a L90 Mouchette as a hard carry through event stages.  Can you elaborate a bit more on how we'd use her to do so?  I did that before, and had to spend 3 continues on getting through the event ha ha ha...  

Thank you for the great guide!  It gives me a lot of perspective
